nature_language:
We are 2 people, departing from Shanghai, traveling to Nanjing for 3 days, and must meet either of the following requirements:
1. We do not wish to visit Taiping Heavenly Kingdom History Museum (Zhan Garden).
2. We want to try one of the following restaurants: Caogiao Halal Beef Pot Sticker and Dumpling Shop (Hongtuqiao Branch).
